title: Show all milestone points and revert vision board to version 28 layout

requirements.text: In VisionBoard.tsx, ensure all milestone points for each goal are fully visible — no milestones should be hidden, collapsed, or truncated. All milestone items must be rendered in the list regardless of count.

quotes: All milestone point should be visible

acceptanceCriteria: Every milestone associated with a goal is displayed in the UI without any 'show more' toggle or item limit
Adding multiple milestones to a goal shows all of them rendered in the list
No milestone items are hidden or clipped due to overflow or conditional rendering

requirements.text: Revert the VisionBoard.tsx page to the layout, interaction patterns, and visual design it had in version 28. This means undoing the milestone plus-button interaction pattern (introduced in version 36) and restoring the original milestone input fields and overall vision board UI as it appeared in version 28.

quotes: revert the vision board as it was in version 28

acceptanceCriteria: The vision board page layout matches the version 28 design, not the version 36 changes
Milestone input uses the original per-line input field pattern from version 28, not the plus-button pattern introduced in version 36
All goal categories, cards, and controls appear and behave as they did in version 28
The partner read-only tab remains functional after the revert

constraints: Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/ (immutable paths)
Do not modify files under frontend/src/components/ui/ (immutable paths)
Backend data model and API must remain unchanged — this is a frontend-only revert
nonGoals: Reverting any other page besides VisionBoard.tsx
Altering the plus-button pattern on any non-vision-board page (e.g., tasks in DailyPlanner)
